description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:lts Docker image, with a cache keyed on package-lock.json and ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG} that stores node_modules/. Define stages setup, check, test, release; in the setup stage add a setup:dependencies job that runs npm ci and saves node_modules/ as an artifact expiring in one month. In the check stage add a check:code job that runs npm run lint, and a check:version job that runs only on the master branch, executes ./scripts/check_semantic_versioning.sh and sets a GITLAB_MERGE_REQUEST_API variable. In the test stage add a test:units job that runs npm test and publishes the coverage directory as an artifact named ui-components-coverage-${CI_BUILD_REF_NAME}. In the release stage add a pages job using node:lts-alpine that installs git via apk, builds documentation with npm run doc:build, copies assets, rewrites CSS paths, moves static to public and publishes the public folder as an artifact, and a release:package job that runs only on tags, writes an .npmrc with the NPM_TOKEN secret and runs npm publish.
